text:
# pkg_info | grep ezm3
ezm3-1.1_2          Easier, more portable Modula-3 distribution for building CV
# portversion -v | grep ezm3
ezm3-1.1_2                  <  needs updating (port has 1.2_1)
# grep -ir amd64 /usr/ports/lang/ezm3/distinfo
